items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for clear install/uninstall lifecycle handling. However, the provided evidence does not include any references to the implementation or testing of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for clear install/uninstall lifecycle handling, but there is no concrete evidence showing that this requirement has been satisfied or even attempted, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
